languages.text: "Если мы будем знать, где и когда появится эта тварь, и тем более выманить ее в удобное для нас место... Нет ничего, что устояло бы перед точным попаданием орбитального ланс-орудия, Лорд-капитан".
"If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Если мы будем знать, где и когда появится эта тварь, и тем более выманить ее в удобное для нас место... Нет ничего, что устояло бы перед точным попаданием орбитального ланс-орудия, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."
"If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."
"If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「もしこの敵の出現場所と時間、そして誘導方法が分かれば、軌道上のランスの直撃は、何にも止められないでしょう、艦長」
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「もしこの敵の出現場所と時間、そして誘導方法が分かれば、軌道上のランスの直撃は、何にも止められないでしょう、艦長」

languages.text: «Si sabemos dónde y cuándo aparecerá esa cosa y podemos atraerla hasta un lugar propicio... Nada puede sobrevivir al impacto directo de una lanza orbital, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Si sabemos dónde y cuándo aparecerá esa cosa y podemos atraerla hasta un lugar propicio... Nada puede sobrevivir al impacto directo de una lanza orbital, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: “既然知道它们会出现在何时何地，又有办法将其引诱至合适位置……那么，舰长大人，没有任何存在能扛得住轨道光矛的直接威力。”
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “既然知道它们会出现在何时何地，又有办法将其引诱至合适位置……那么，舰长大人，没有任何存在能扛得住轨道光矛的直接威力。”

languages.text: "Wenn wir wissen, wo und wann dieses Ding auftaucht, wissen wir auch, wie wir es an einen geeigneten Ort locken können ... Nichts widersteht dem direkten Beschuss einer Orbitallanze, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn wir wissen, wo und wann dieses Ding auftaucht, wissen wir auch, wie wir es an einen geeigneten Ort locken können ... Nichts widersteht dem direkten Beschuss einer Orbitallanze, Lord Captain."

languages.text: "Bu şeyin nerede ve ne zaman ortaya çıkacağını ve onu uygun bir konuma nasıl çekeceğimizi bilirsek... Yörüngesel bir mızrak bataryasından gelen doğrudan bir darbeye dayanabilecek hiçbir şey yoktur Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Bu şeyin nerede ve ne zaman ortaya çıkacağını ve onu uygun bir konuma nasıl çekeceğimizi bilirsek... Yörüngesel bir mızrak bataryasından gelen doğrudan bir darbeye dayanabilecek hiçbir şey yoktur Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: « Si nous savons où et quand ces choses apparaîtront, et comment les attirer à un endroit stratégique... Rien ne peut survivre à une frappe directe d'une lance orbitale, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Si nous savons où et quand ces choses apparaîtront, et comment les attirer à un endroit stratégique... Rien ne peut survivre à une frappe directe d'une lance orbitale, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
